creator: nosuzuki@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
Please import my patch for updating ports/graphics/xzgv.

The new version of xzgv was released and I made a patch for current xzgv port. The patch file is uuencoded followed by gzip, I mean gziped and uuencoded.

In addition to the updating patch, I also removed post-install section from Makefile. In that section, "make" was doing strip exec file and installing info-file. I have imported them into patch files in files dir to change original Makefile.

Thank you.
